items.title: Sources: Saints, LB Elliss reunite on 3-year deal
items.summary: The Saints have agreed to a three-year, $33 million deal with linebacker Kaden Elliss, according to NFL Network. Originally drafted by New Orleans, Elliss has spent the past three seasons with the Falcons.

items.title: Snell, FB who helped Jets win SB III, dies at 84
items.summary: Matt Snell, a three-time Pro Bowl fullback who scored the only touchdown in the Jets' upset of the Colts in Super Bowl III, died of natural causes Tuesday at age 84.
